description: Pre-implementation coverage baseline for IFC-312 AI chains surface area. All 10 target chain files, shared enrichment adapter, 5 BullMQ job processors, new Prisma models (AccountAIInsight, ContactReplyDraft), new Account scalars (score/scoreProvenance/etc.), and new tRPC procedures (contact.{suggestTags,generateInsight,draftReply,listReplyDrafts} + account.{suggestTags,generateInsight,scoreAccount,getAiInsight}) do not yet exist on disk. Baseline is empty by construction.
command: npx vitest run apps/ai-worker/src apps/api/src/modules/contact apps/api/src/modules/account --coverage --coverage.provider=istanbul --coverage.include='apps/ai-worker/src/contact-*.chain.ts' --coverage.include='apps/ai-worker/src/account-*.chain.ts' --coverage.include='apps/ai-worker/src/shared/enrichment-adapter.ts' --coverage.include='apps/ai-worker/src/jobs/**' --coverage.include='apps/api/src/modules/contact/contact.router.ts' --coverage.include='apps/api/src/modules/account/account.router.ts'
notes: All IFC-312 AI chain target files, shared enrichment adapter, new BullMQ job processors, and new Prisma models/scalars are newly created during exec; baseline is empty by construction.

Existing contact.router.ts + account.router.ts will be MODIFIED (new procedures added); per-file baselines are captured from current HEAD implicitly (coverage will drop momentarily during RED phase then rise above baseline in GREEN).
After-implementation coverage will be recorded in artifacts/coverage/coverage-summary.json (executive dashboard) and cited in IFC-312-delivery.md under Phase 4.1 scoped coverage results.
